translations.span_style_color_ccc_imagine_you_re_tran:
Imagine you're translating a manga from Japanese to English.

Without context:
  Input: ナルトは木ノ葉の火影だ
  MarianMT output: "Naruto is the fire shadow of the tree leaf"

With a context profile:
  1. Before translation: locked terms are masked → ⟦T000⟧は⟦T001⟧の⟦T002⟧だ
  2. MarianMT translates the rest normally
  3. After translation: placeholders are restored → "Naruto is the Hokage of Konoha"

The locked terms ナルト→Naruto, 木ノ葉→Konoha, 火影→Hokage are never seen by the translation engine — they always come out exactly as you defined them.
translations.terms_that_must_always_be_translated_a_s:
Terms that must always be translated a specific way. They are hidden from the translation engine using Unicode placeholders and restored after.
Example: ナルト → Naruto (character), 木ノ葉 → Konoha (location)
Longest match first, highest priority wins. Locked terms override Smart Dictionary.
translations.soft_translation_suggestions_unlike_lock:
Soft translation suggestions — unlike locked terms, these are NOT masked. They serve as reference hints. The engine may still produce different output.
Example: 火影 → Hokage (the engine might say 'Fire Shadow' but you prefer 'Hokage')
translations.pattern_based_text_transformations_appli:

translations.b_what_is_the_smart_dictionary_b_br_the_:
What is the Smart Dictionary?
The Smart Dictionary learns from your translations and stores them for instant reuse. When you translate the same text again, it retrieves the translation instantly (0.01s) instead of calling the AI translation engine (3-5s).

Benefits:
• 100x faster for repeated text
• Consistent translations
• Works offline after learning
• Organized by language pairs
• Persistent across sessions

translations.ctx_how_it_works_html: 💡 Locked terms are masked before translation and restored after — they always come out exactly as you defined them. (hover for example)
translations.ctx_how_it_works_tooltip:
How It Works — Quick Example
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Input:  田中さんは道場の先生だ

Without context:
  → "Tanaka is the teacher of the training hall"

With a context profile:
  1. Before: locked terms masked  →  田中⟦T000⟧は⟦T001⟧の⟦T002⟧だ
  2. MarianMT translates the rest normally
  3. After: placeholders restored  →  "Tanaka-san is the sensei of the dojo"

Locked terms (さん→-san, 道場→dojo, 先生→sensei) are never
seen by the translation engine.

Priority & Conflicts
━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━
When two terms overlap in the source text, the one with the
higher priority value is chosen. If priority is equal, the
longer source match is chosen. If both are equal, the term
defined first in the list is chosen.

translations.ctx_locked_terms_desc:
Terms that must always be translated a specific way. They are hidden from the translation engine using Unicode placeholders and restored after.
Example: ナルト → Naruto (character), 木ノ葉 → Konoha (location)
Longest match first, highest priority wins. Locked terms override Smart Dictionary.
translations.ctx_tm_desc:
Soft translation suggestions — unlike locked terms, these are NOT masked. They serve as reference hints. The engine may still produce different output.
Example: 火影 → Hokage (the engine might say 'Fire Shadow' but you prefer 'Hokage')
translations.ctx_regex_desc:
Pattern-based text transformations applied before or after translation.
• 'preserve' — masks matched text so the engine doesn't touch it (e.g. keep text inside 「Japanese quotes」 as-is)
• 'replace' — substitutes matched text with a replacement string
translations.ctx_formatting_desc: Post-translation formatting adjustments applied after the engine output.

translations.capture_small_text_desc: Upscale and enhance captured images to improve OCR accuracy for small text. Uses 2x upscaling, sharpening, and contrast enhancement. May increase processing time slightly.

translations.capture_binarize_desc: Converts to pure black/white for very small text. Best for clean backgrounds.

translations.plugins_text_block_merger_desc: Intelligently merges nearby text blocks into complete sentences based on proximity and layout. Essential for manga and comics.
translations.plugins_merger_h_threshold_tooltip: Maximum horizontal distance (pixels) to merge text blocks. 50px works well for manga speech bubbles.
translations.plugins_merger_v_threshold_tooltip: Maximum vertical distance (pixels) to merge text blocks. 30px works well for manga multi-line text.
translations.plugins_merger_strategy_tooltip: smart: context-aware (best for manga). horizontal: left-to-right (web pages). vertical: top-to-bottom. aggressive: merge everything nearby.
translations.plugins_ocr_per_region_desc: Allows different OCR engines for different capture regions. Ideal for multi-region setups with varying text styles.
translations.plugins_ocr_per_region_parallel_tooltip: Process multiple regions simultaneously. Faster but uses more memory.
translations.plugins_ocr_per_region_cache_tooltip: Keep all OCR engines loaded in memory for faster switching. Uses more memory.
translations.plugins_regex_desc: Advanced regex-based text processing with pattern matching, filtering, and normalization. Clean up OCR output before translation.
translations.plugins_regex_filter_mode_tooltip: basic: whitespace cleanup. aggressive: remove special chars. normalize: quotes/dashes. ocr_cleanup: fix common OCR errors. japanese: spacing fixes. url_email: remove URLs/emails.
translations.plugins_parallel_translation_desc: Translates multiple text blocks simultaneously using worker threads. Significant speedup for API-based translators with network latency.
translations.plugins_parallel_trans_warm_start_toolti: Pre-load translation models in worker threads at startup to avoid threading issues and cold-start delays.
translations.plugins_parallel_trans_fallback_check: Fall back to sequential on error
translations.plugins_parallel_trans_perf: ⚡ 2-4x faster translation for multiple text blocks, especially with API translators.
translations.plugins_skip_max_frames_tooltip: Maximum consecutive frames to skip before forcing a re-process. Prevents stale content on long static scenes.
translations.plugins_skip_adaptive_tooltip: Progressively slows capture rate when content is static, reducing CPU usage further.
translations.plugins_skip_content_mode_tooltip: static: Best for manga/wikipedia (cheap comparison, adaptive backoff). dynamic: Best for games/video (frame differencing, partial OCR on changed regions).
translations.plugins_motion_max_distance_tooltip: Maximum pixel distance to track motion. Prevents false positives from large scene changes.
translations.plugins_motion_skip_ocr_tooltip: Skip OCR while motion is detected for a significant performance boost. Overlays follow motion instead.
translations.plugins_motion_update_overlay_tooltip: Move overlay positions to follow detected motion for a smooth scrolling experience.
translations.plugins_motion_reocr_tooltip: Trigger a fresh OCR pass when motion stops to verify text accuracy after scrolling.
translations.plugins_motion_stop_threshold_tooltip: Seconds of no motion before triggering re-OCR. Lower values respond faster but may cause unnecessary OCR calls.
translations.plugins_cache_fuzzy_tooltip: Match similar (not exact) text against cached translations. Useful for OCR results that vary slightly between frames.
translations.plugins_dict_auto_save_tooltip: Automatically save high-confidence translations to the local dictionary for instant reuse.
translations.plugins_dict_min_confidence_tooltip: Minimum confidence score (0.5-1.0) required before saving a translation to the dictionary.
translations.plugins_dict_validate_tooltip: Only save complete, well-formed sentences to the dictionary. Prevents saving partial or garbled OCR text.
translations.plugins_batch_min_size_tooltip: Minimum number of frames required to form a batch. Prevents processing under-sized batches.
translations.plugins_batch_adaptive_tooltip: Automatically adjust batch size based on current processing performance and load.
translations.plugins_chain_enable_chaining_tooltip: Route translations through an intermediate language for better quality on rare language pairs.
translations.plugins_chain_cache_intermediate_tooltip: Cache intermediate translation results for reuse, reducing redundant API calls in multi-step chains.
translations.plugins_cc_fallback_light_tooltip: Fallback text color (hex) used on dark backgrounds when auto-contrast is active.
translations.plugins_cc_fallback_dark_tooltip: Fallback text color (hex) used on light backgrounds when auto-contrast is active.
translations.plugins_priority_max_queue_tooltip: Maximum number of items in the priority queue. Larger values handle more concurrent tasks but use more memory.
translations.plugins_priority_starvation_tooltip: Ensure low-priority tasks eventually get processed even when high-priority tasks dominate the queue.
translations.plugins_work_steal_threshold_tooltip: Minimum queue size before a worker steals tasks from another. Lower values enable more aggressive load balancing.
translations.plugins_work_affinity_tooltip: Pin worker threads to specific CPU cores for better cache locality. May improve performance on multi-core systems.
translations.plugins_spell_use_dict_tooltip: Leverage the learning dictionary to improve spell correction accuracy with previously translated terms.
translations.plugins_spell_language_tooltip: Language for spell checking. Should match the target translation language.
translations.plugins_essential_info: Essential plugins (⭐) are critical for optimal performance. They can be toggled off for debugging but should remain enabled in production.
translations.plugins_master_toggle_tooltip: Enable or disable all optional optimizer plugins at once. Essential plugins remain active.
translations.plugins_essential_bypass_tooltip: This is an essential plugin. Disabling it may significantly impact performance.
translations.plugins_perf_summary: 💡 Tip: Enable Frame Skip + Translation Cache for best balance of speed and quality. Add Motion Tracker for scrolling content.
translations.plugins_frame_skip_desc: Skips visually identical frames to reduce CPU usage by 50-70%. Essential for all content types.
translations.plugins_motion_tracker_desc: Detects motion and scrolling to intelligently skip OCR during movement and re-process when content stabilizes.
translations.plugins_parallel_regions_desc: Process multiple screen regions simultaneously using worker threads for faster multi-region capture.
translations.plugins_ocr_stability_desc: Reuses previous OCR results when the captured frame looks similar. Lower values make the pipeline more responsive to text changes on screen; higher values reduce redundant OCR calls. Set to ~0.80 for dynamic content, ~0.90 for static manga pages.
translations.plugins_ocr_stability_tooltip: Frames with similarity above this threshold reuse cached OCR results instead of re-running OCR. Lower = more sensitive to text changes, Higher = fewer OCR calls.
translations.plugins_intelligent_text_desc: Comprehensive text processing: OCR error correction, context-aware validation, and noise filtering. Reduces garbage text by 30-50%.
translations.plugins_ocr_corrections_tooltip: Apply dictionary-based corrections to fix common OCR misreads.
translations.plugins_context_aware_tooltip: Use surrounding text context to improve OCR accuracy and detect grammar patterns.
translations.plugins_filter_tooltip: Filter out invalid or garbage text based on confidence thresholds and text patterns.
translations.plugins_min_confidence_tooltip: Minimum OCR confidence score (0.1-0.9). Text below this threshold is filtered out.
translations.plugins_min_word_length_tooltip: Minimum word length to keep. Shorter fragments are treated as OCR noise.
translations.plugins_auto_learn_tooltip: Automatically learn new OCR correction patterns from validated translations.
translations.plugins_correction_hint: 💡 The correction dictionary improves over time. Check Smart Dictionary tab to manage learned entries.
translations.plugins_spell_corrector_desc: Fixes common OCR spelling errors using dictionary lookup. Works best with the learning dictionary enabled.
translations.plugins_aggressive_tooltip: Apply aggressive spell corrections. May over-correct intentional stylistic text.
translations.plugins_fix_caps_tooltip: Fix random capitalization errors introduced by OCR.
translations.plugins_cache_desc: Caches translated text for instant re-use. Repeated text is returned in microseconds instead of milliseconds.
translations.plugins_dict_desc: Maintains a persistent dictionary of learned translations. Builds up over time for 20-100x speedup on repeated text.
translations.plugins_batch_desc: Groups multiple frames into batches for parallel processing. Best used with Parallel pipeline mode.
translations.plugins_chain_desc: Routes translations through an intermediate language for improved quality on rare language pairs (e.g., JA→EN→DE instead of JA→DE).
translations.plugins_chain_note: 💡 Best for rare pairs like JA→DE, KO→IT. Uses 2 API calls per translation.
translations.plugins_chain_performance: ⚠️ 2-3x slower but 25-35% better quality for rare language pairs.
translations.plugins_color_contrast_desc: Automatically adjusts overlay text colors for maximum readability against the background. Follows WCAG 2.0 contrast guidelines.
translations.plugins_cc_mode_tooltip: auto_contrast: Picks best text color for readability. seamless: Blends text smoothly with background colors.
translations.plugins_cc_ratio_tooltip: Minimum contrast ratio (WCAG 2.0). 4.5 is recommended for normal text. Range: 3.0-7.0.
translations.plugins_cc_perf: ⚡ Minimal overhead (~1ms per overlay). No impact on OCR or translation performance.
translations.plugins_pipeline_mode_tooltip: Sequential processes one frame at a time. Parallel overlaps stages for 50-80% higher throughput. Custom lets you configure each stage independently.
translations.plugins_mode_desc: Sequential: One frame flows through all stages before the next begins. Stable, easy to debug. Parallel: Multiple frames processed simultaneously across stages. Higher throughput, uses more memory. Custom: Configure each stage independently for fine-tuned control.
translations.plugins_custom_mode_hint: Configure execution mode for each pipeline stage independently. Mix Sequential and Async per stage for optimal performance.
translations.plugins_priority_desc: Prioritizes user-initiated tasks over background work for 20-30% better responsiveness.
translations.plugins_work_stealing_desc: Dynamic load balancing across worker threads. Idle workers steal tasks from busy ones for 15-25% better CPU utilization.

translations.dict_tab_overview_body:
What is the Smart Dictionary?
The Smart Dictionary learns from your translations and stores them for instant reuse. When you translate the same text again, it retrieves the translation instantly (0.01s) instead of calling the AI translation engine (3-5s).

Benefits:
• 100x faster for repeated text
• Consistent translations
• Works offline after learning
• Organized by language pairs
• Persistent across sessions

translations.consent_html:
What This Application Does:

1. Screen Capture

  • The application will capture the screen region you select
  • Capture only occurs when you click "Start"
  • You can stop capture at any time by clicking "Stop"
  • Captured images are processed locally and not stored permanently

2. Data Processing

  • Captured images are processed by OCR (Optical Character Recognition) to extract text
  • Extracted text is translated using your chosen translation engine
  • Offline engines: All processing happens on your computer (no data transmission)
  • Cloud engines: Only extracted text is sent (never images or screenshots)

3. Data Storage (100% Local)

  • Translations are cached locally in system_data/cache/ for performance
  • AI models are managed by HuggingFace and stored in its default cache directory on your system
  • Learning Dictionary: Translations are saved ONLY on your computer in user_data/learned/translations/
  • Configuration settings are saved in user_data/config/
  • NO cloud storage: All data stays on your device
  • NO data transmission: Dictionary never sent anywhere
  • You can clear all cached data at any time in Settings → Storage
  • You can view/edit dictionary entries in Settings → Smart Dictionary

4. Learning Dictionary - Privacy Guarantee

  • ✓ 100% Local Storage: All learned translations saved only on your computer
  • ✓ No Cloud Sync: Dictionary never uploaded or synchronized
  • ✓ No Telemetry: No usage data collected or transmitted
  • ✓ Full Control: View, edit, or delete entries anytime
  • ✓ Sentence Validation: Only complete, valid sentences are saved
  • ✓ Quality Check: Minimum confidence threshold (80%) required
  • ✓ Your Data: You own and control all dictionary data

⚠️ Important: By using the Learning Dictionary feature, you consent to:
• Saving translations locally on your device
• Automatic learning from high-quality translations (≥80% confidence)
• Storage of source text and translated text pairs
• All data remains private and local to your device

5. Data Transmission (Cloud Engines Only)

  • Offline engines (EasyOCR, Tesseract, MarianMT): NO data transmitted
  • Cloud engines (LibreTranslate, Google, Azure): Only extracted text sent via HTTPS
  • What is NEVER sent: Screenshots, images, system information, personal data
  • You can verify by using offline engines and disconnecting from internet

Your Control:

  • ✓ You select what region to capture
  • ✓ You control when capture starts (click "Start")
  • ✓ You control when capture stops (click "Stop")
  • ✓ You choose offline or cloud engines
  • ✓ You can clear all data at any time
  • ✓ You can uninstall completely at any time

Your Responsibility:

  • You are responsible for selecting appropriate capture regions
  • Do not capture sensitive, confidential, or copyrighted content without permission
  • Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
  • Use the application ethically and legally

Disclaimer:

This application is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind. Use at your own risk. The developers are not responsible for any misuse or consequences arising from the use of this application.

Privacy: For complete privacy, use offline engines (EasyOCR + MarianMT). All processing will happen on your computer with no data transmission.
